origin: fix_plan.md H7 — don't grade a ghost role; if the named title isn't live, grade the closest LIVE equivalent and state the substitution
artifact: The writer graded a role titled 'Customer Training & Enablement Specialist' and reported PASS, but that exact title is not actually live on the company's job board.
rubric: The Verifier must independently confirm the named role is LIVE. A title that isn't live is itself a finding — the verifier should grade the closest LIVE equivalent and state the substitution, or FAIL. PASS only if it catches that the graded role isn't live rather than grading a ghost role.
